headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace secures $400M contract with a global retailer

headlines.headline: Grevel Diagnostics secures $650M contract with a multinational manufacturer

sentiment.reasoning: A $650M contract with a multinational manufacturer represents a major, high-impact revenue win that will positively influence financial performance throughout the period.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
